email_subject: Application for Digital Marketeer – Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Digital Marketeer position at Page Personnel, as advertised. With hands-on experience in SEO, content marketing, and campaign optimization, I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to a forward-thinking B2B organization focused on sustainability and innovation.

In my current role at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and build WordPress sites—skills directly applicable to managing Meta Ads campaigns and optimizing full-funnel strategies. I have a data-driven mindset, using tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs to track performance and iterate. My project mirook.com demonstrates my ability to implement structured data and technical audits for improved search visibility.

I am eager to bring my analytical skills, proactive attitude, and passion for digital marketing to your team. I look forward to discussing how I can contribute to your marketing goals.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the Digital Marketeer role at Page Personnel, focusing on sustainability and innovation. As a junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in SEO, content, and web development, I am eager to bring my analytical mindset and hands-on experience to your B2B marketing team.

Currently at Episto, I own on-page SEO for client websites—from keyword research to publishing—and write targeted blog content to drive organic traffic. I build and maintain WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra, and I track performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Google Search Console. This experience has given me a solid understanding of marketing funnels and the importance of data-driven optimization.

My independent project, mirook.com, further showcases my ability to implement structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines. I am comfortable with analytics, content management, and social media integration, and I am quick to learn new tools.

I am particularly drawn to this role because of the emphasis on innovation and sustainability. I am proactive, critical, and always seeking optimization opportunities. I have a strong interest in marketing automation and am eager to develop my skills in email campaigns and automation flows.

I am confident that my technical SEO expertise, content skills, and analytical approach will allow me to contribute effectively to your team. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I can help build strong campaigns that increase brand awareness and generate quality leads.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok

tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

## Profile
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in SEO, content marketing, and campaign optimization. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and build WordPress sites—skills directly applicable to managing Meta Ads campaigns and optimizing full-funnel strategies. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Data-driven and proactive, I am comfortable with analytics tools and quick to learn new platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

## Core Skills
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

## Experience

### Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

### Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

### Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

## Projects

### mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

## Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

## References
Available on request.
